name: Pixel Pixie
short_description: A Vorpal Knight with twisted ambitions has kidnapped the last Pixies to drain their power! Replace your weak starting party with stronger heroes, find useful items and game-changing relics, and assemble a formidable rescue team in this roguelike auto-battler—a love letter to the 8-bit RPGs of yore.
detailed_description:
A powerful Vorpal Knight has kidnapped the last Pixies to drain their power and feed his ambitions! Start with a wimpy party composed entirely of children and grow ever-stronger as you recruit awesome heroes, find useful items, and discover game-changing relics. Assemble a legendary rescue team in this roguelike auto-battler — a love letter to the 8-bit RPGs of yore!

Magical creatures and humans lived in harmony for millennia, until a war broke out! Centuries later, magical creatures have been in hiding so long that most humans think they're just old fairy tales. But word on the street is that one BAD hombre believes they're real, and he's on the hunt for them, especially Pixies!

After years of searching, he finally managed to capture them... All except ONE, that is! It's up to the last pixie to find help. There's no telling what unimaginable evil that villain could unleash if he’s allowed enough time to drain all those pixies' magical powers.

You'll help, won't you?

Can you really say no to that face?

Customize your party!

Expand your party to contain up to 6 characters at once. With 32 unique classes to find and recruit, that’s over 906,192 possible unique party compositions! Combine that with dozens of game-changing relics and items for near-limitless possibilities. (Those numbers don't even consider party formation or duplicate characters!)

Have children fight for you!

Feedback suggests this is a selling point? Have small, weak children fight dangerous monsters on your behalf! Why are there so many cop cars outside? (Unintelligible SWAT noises.)

Explore the land!

Make your way through at least 5 unique biomes, including vast deserts, lush forests, and dangerous volcanic plains. Traverse towns, mysterious landmarks, booby-trapped caves, bazaars, and much more as you make your way to the villain's lair.

Grow Stronger!

Continuously unlock new characters, events, and upgrades between attempts. Permanently improve your chances of beating overwhelming odds!

Strategize before battle! 

Your party will do its best to defeat any challenge they face, but only you can ensure victory by choosing the best team composition for each encounter and using your consumable items wisely. Your decisions will shape the fate of your party, the Pixies, and the world!

Flexible difficulty settings!

Unlock harder difficulty modes with each successful run. Or, if you're looking for a more relaxed experience, enjoy CASUAL MODE — a more forgiving experience that allows you to retry if you fall in battle.

True victory only awaits those who can beat the hardest difficulty setting, though... So, are you ready for a challenge?
